scope: exploratory Class continuity readout only; not event-centered Axis Specification v2 confirmation

targets.primary: unique confident fork-majority Class at the current B2 state; at least two confident forks; ties or insufficient support are missing
targets.secondary: confident deterministic B2 base-final Class, evaluated separately at every state

folds.assignment: round-robin after ordering; inner folds reapply the same ordering to the current outer-training videos

preprocessing.wide_vector_projection: fixed outcome-independent Gaussian projection with seed SHA256('non-human-readout-v1:projection:'+view_name), entries N(0,1/sqrt(256)), float32
preprocessing.class_weighting: inverse training-class frequency normalized to mean one

linear_probe.model: class-weighted ridge least-squares classifier with intercept
linear_probe.probabilities: stable softmax of held-out ridge scores; no post-hoc calibration

mlp_probe.input: the same fixed projected pooled view

single_query_attention_probe.token_width_projection: fixed outcome-independent Gaussian projection to 32 channels using SHA256('non-human-readout-v1:projection:attention_tokens')
single_query_attention_probe.trainable_parameters: one 32-channel query and one linear multiclass head
single_query_attention_probe.attention: softmax token dot query divided by sqrt(32), followed by weighted token pooling

selection.metric: mean inner-fold balanced accuracy from candidate-level predictions

metrics.balanced_accuracy: macro recall over classes present in the evaluated target rows
metrics.majority_margin: balanced accuracy minus the paired majority/null balanced accuracy
metrics.coverage: fraction with maximum predicted probability at least 0.5

readout_points.information: earliest progress where the paired video-bootstrap lower 95% bounds are above zero versus both majority/null and conditioning-only
